# appendSmartTags

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for appendSmartTags

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useAppendSmartTagsMutation(); mutate({ input: { pTableId: '<UUID>', pTags: '<JSON>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useAppendSmartTagsMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useAppendSmartTagsMutation();
mutate({ input: { pTableId: '<UUID>', pTags: '<JSON>' } });
```
